regimeSub: Post-NFP shock consolidation as markets digest 57K miss while Warsh hawks stay silent ahead of July FOMC.
themes: June NFP 57K vs ~150K est with LFPR at 5-year low → stagflation setup intensifies but VIX at 16.15 shows equity vol complacent despite labor market crack
Warsh at Sintra (Jul 1-2) vowed to 'disappoint' inflation doves with 4-week rate decision timeline → DXY slips to 100.95 as July hike odds recalibrate post-payrolls
BOJ at 1% with tapering end FY2027 fails to arrest USDJPY at 161.76 → JPY weakness persists as real rate differential dominates nominal policy tightening
KOSPI at 7909 holds despite ₩148T foreign outflows as SK Hynix/HBM dominance offsets KRW weakness to 1533 → BOK hike speculation (Jul 16) caps further won slide

signalNotes.name: US Real Rate
signalNotes.note: 10Y 4.48% minus 4.2% CPI = 28bp real; thin cushion if inflation reaccelerates on energy

signalNotes.name: 2s10s Curve
signalNotes.note: 2Y 4.17% vs 10Y 4.48% = +31bp steepening; growth scare flatteners not materializing yet

signalNotes.name: HY Credit Spread
signalNotes.note: Credit ignoring NFP miss for now; watch for lag as labor deterioration feeds earnings

signalNotes.name: VIX
signalNotes.note: 16.15 oddly sanguine post-57K NFP shock; complacency into July FOMC decision window

signalNotes.name: Brent Crude
signalNotes.note: 72.07 stable post-Iran ceasefire; OPEC cut chatter offsets demand concerns from weak jobs

signalNotes.name: Gold
signalNotes.note: 4184.5 bid as stagflation hedge; worst monthly drop in June now reversing on growth fears

signalNotes.name: USD / KRW
signalNotes.note: 1533 stable as BOK Jul 16 hike speculation builds; HBM flows offsetting broad EM weakness

signalNotes.name: Semiconductor SOX
signalNotes.note: SK Hynix > Samsung market cap flip sustains; HBM capex cycle intact despite macro headwinds

headline: Markets consolidate post-June NFP shock (57K) as Warsh's July hike threat hangs over stagflationary 4.2% CPI backdrop with no Fed speakers to clarify path.
